zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Baskerville於1335年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾易亞迪斯利時，他的父親Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe34歲，母親Jane de Poyntz32歲。他於1372年與Isabella Hampton在英國英格蘭賀福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1374年3月20日在英國賀福爾易亞迪斯利享年39歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾易亞迪斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Baskerville于1335年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾易亞迪斯利时，他的父亲Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe34岁，母亲Jane de Poyntz32岁。他于1372年与Isabella Hampton在英国英格兰賀福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1374年3月20日在英国賀福爾易亞迪斯利享年39岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾易亞迪斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Baskerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Boscherville in Eure, France, named with Old Anglo-Norman French boschet ‘copse, thicket’ (a diminutive of Bois ) + ville ‘settlement, town’.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Baskerville was born in 1335, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe, was 34 and his mother, Jane de Poyntz, was 32. He married Isabella Hampton in 1372, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 20 March 1374, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Baskerville est né en 1335, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Jane de Poyntz, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Hampton en 1372, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 mars 1374, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Baskerville 1335 in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe 34 und seine Mutter Jane de Poyntz 32. Er hat 1372 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Isabella Hampton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. März 1374 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Baskerville è nato il nel 1335 nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Jane de Poyntz, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Hampton nel 1372, nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1374, nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Eardisley, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Baskervilleが1335年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで生まれた時，父Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combeは34歳，母Jane de Poyntzは32歳であった。1372年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでIsabella Hamptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1374年3月20日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで39歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Baskerville(이)가 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane de Poyntz(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1372년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 Isabella Hampton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1374년 3월 20일 영국 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Baskerville nasceu em 1335, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Jane de Poyntz, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Hampton em 1372, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de março de 1374, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Baskerville родился в 1335 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Jane de Poyntz, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Hampton в 1372 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 марта 1374 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Baskerville nació en 1335, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Jane de Poyntz, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Isabella Hampton en 1372, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1374, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
